overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic shantytown market area. The player moves from a covered underpass through open plazas, military tents, and crowded dining areas with makeshift structures and neon accents. Bright midday sun illuminates the dusty, post-industrial urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass leading to open plaza

events.description: exits covered underpass into open sunlit plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a concrete underpass toward an open plaza with futuristic buildings

notable_agents.action: standing near a concrete column, observing the area

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass with distinctive turquoise beams overhead
tall futuristic building with diagonal yellow and black striped facade
tall industrial crane visible against the sky
entrance to a large military-style canvas tent at the end of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a turquoise concrete overpass with graffiti on the walls. The camera moves forward into a sunlit open plaza with a distinctive yellow-striped skyscraper on the right and construction cranes in the distance. A lone NPC stands near a column on the left as the player approaches a canvas tent entrance at the far end of the plaza.

events.description: enters dark canvas tent from bright outdoor plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit military tent with storage containers and medical supplies

entered.detail: large olive-green canvas tent forming a covered corridor
stacked blue plastic storage crates along the tent wall
single bare light bulb hanging from the tent ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark canvas tent from the bright plaza, passing blue storage containers and a hanging light fixture. The enclosed space has dirt ground and canvas walls. After passing through, the player exits back into sunlight, leaving the tent entrance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift camp pathway with military tents

events.description: approaching crowded dining area with tables and chairs visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path lined with green military tents and yellow barriers, passing various camp residents

notable_agents.action: sitting inside a tent, visible through the entrance

entered.detail: large olive-green canvas tent with open flaps showing interior
bright yellow construction barriers lining the left side of the path
large cylindrical white water tank with graffiti
cluster of white plastic tables and chairs indicating dining area

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dusty camp pathway lined with yellow barriers and green military tents. The player passes a large water tank on the right and approaches a dining area with white plastic tables visible in the distance. Various NPCs are scattered along the path, some sitting in tent entrances.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area with food stalls

events.description: enters crowded dining area with many people sitting at plastic tables

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowded outdoor dining area, passing between tables where people are eating and socializing

notable_agents.action: tattooed man standing and walking among the tables
person with green hair standing near a food stall

entered.detail: tall yellow fabric banner hanging from scaffolding
makeshift food preparation area with tables and cooking equipment
yellow metal scaffolding supporting banners and lights

segments.scene_description: The player enters a bustling outdoor dining area filled with white plastic tables and chairs. Numerous NPCs are seated eating and socializing, while others walk between the tables. Large yellow banners hang from scaffolding on the left, and a food stall is visible on the right. The atmosphere is lively and crowded.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway leading to command tent

events.description: enters covered tent area with computer monitors and digital screens

agents.ego_description: walking up a metal ramp into an elevated tent containing computer equipment and seated personnel

notable_agents.action: person with red cap standing near computer screens

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with railings leading upward
multiple computer screens displaying green digital interfaces
metal folding chairs arranged in rows facing the monitors

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the dining area and ascends a metal ramp walkway. Entering a covered tent at the top, the scene reveals a command center with computer monitors displaying green data screens and folding chairs arranged for personnel. The space is more organized and technical compared to the chaotic dining area below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty urban underpass through a sprawling makeshift camp and into a technical command center. It begins beneath a turquoise concrete overpass adorned with graffiti, moving forward into a sunlit plaza dominated by a yellow-striped skyscraper and distant construction cranes. As the camera passes through a dark canvas tent and emerges back into the light, the scene shifts to a dusty camp pathway lined with green military tents and yellow barriers. The path then opens into a bustling outdoor dining area filled with white plastic tables and socializing NPCs under large yellow banners, before the camera ascends a metal ramp. Finally, the movement concludes as the player enters a covered tent at the top of the walkway, transitioning from the chaotic market atmosphere into an organized command center filled with green data monitors.
